description: Synthetic Map Component visual QA fixture for point-layer range classification.
notes: Brian visually approved the first range-class demo as good enough for today; refine later.
OpenClaw headless Chromium could render the panel/legend but failed WebGL, so real-browser visual QA is still required for canvas rendering.
Follow-up UI refinements: legend label wrapping/truncation, class-row spacing, request-level custom content plumbing, and real-browser map polish.
